---
title: "基因表达数据提取与相关性分析"
author: "自动生成"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

# 参数设置区域

```{r parameters}
#=================== 用户可调整参数 ===================

# 目标基因列表
target_genes <- c("SCN1A", "SCN2A", "SCN3A")

# BrainSpan数据路径
brainspan_dir <- "BrainSpan" #从8pcw到40yrs的脑组织样本

# GTEx原始数据路径 #需要从官网下载最新版本的，包括成年人多组织的样本
gtex_data_dir <- "D:/组织表达聚类/data/gtex/data_processing/data"
gtex_gct_file <- file.path(gtex_data_dir, "GTEx_Analysis_2022-06-06_v10_RNASeQCv2.4.2_gene_tpm_non_lcm.gct")
gtex_sample_file <- file.path(gtex_data_dir, "GTEx_Analysis_v10_Annotations_SampleAttributesDS.txt")

# 输出目录
output_dir <- "output"

# 字体设置
font_family <- "Arial"
font_size_title <- 14
font_size_axis <- 12
font_size_text <- 10
font_size_annotation <- 10

# 图像尺寸设置（单位：英寸）
fig_width_corrgram <- 8
fig_height_corrgram <- 8
fig_width_scatter <- 4
fig_height_scatter <- 4

# NPG配色方案
npg_colors <- c(
  "#E64B35", "#4DBBD5", "#00A087", "#3C5488", "#F39B7F",
  "#8491B4", "#91D1C2", "#DC0000", "#7E6148", "#B09C85"
)

# 相关性图配色
corr_colors <- c("#3C5488", "#4DBBD5", "white", "#F39B7F", "#E64B35")

# 散点图设置
point_color <- "#8491B4"
line_color <- "#E64B35"
point_size <- 3
line_size <- 1.5

# 相关性分析方法
cor_method <- "pearson"

#===================================================
```

# 环境设置

```{r environment}
Sys.setenv(LANGUAGE = "en")
options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

required_packages <- c("readxl", "writexl", "ggplot2", "svglite", "data.table")

for (pkg in required_packages) {
  if (!require(pkg, character.only = TRUE)) {
    install.packages(pkg, dependencies = TRUE)
    library(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
  }
}
```

# 第一部分：BrainSpan数据提取

```{r extract_brainspan}
cat("\n============================================================\n")
cat("BrainSpan 数据提取\n")
cat("============================================================\n")

columns_meta <- read.csv(file.path(brainspan_dir, "columns_metadata.csv"))
rows_meta <- read.csv(file.path(brainspan_dir, "rows_metadata.csv"))
expression_matrix <- read.csv(file.path(brainspan_dir, "expression_matrix.csv"), header = FALSE)

gene_indices <- sapply(target_genes, function(gene) {
  idx <- which(rows_meta$gene_symbol == gene)
  if (length(idx) == 0) {
    warning(paste("基因", gene, "在BrainSpan数据中未找到"))
    return(NA)
  }
  return(idx[1])
})

brainspan_data <- data.frame(
  Sample = columns_meta$structure_acronym,
  Age = columns_meta$age,
  Donor = columns_meta$donor_name
)

for (i in seq_along(target_genes)) {
  if (!is.na(gene_indices[i])) {
    brainspan_data[[target_genes[i]]] <- as.numeric(expression_matrix[gene_indices[i], -1])
  }
}

brainspan_data$Source <- "BrainSpan"

cat(paste("样本数:", nrow(brainspan_data), "\n"))
```

# 第二部分：GTEx数据提取

```{r extract_gtex}
cat("\n============================================================\n")
cat("GTEx 数据提取（从原始数据）\n")
cat("============================================================\n")

sample_attrs <- read.delim(gtex_sample_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
brain_samples <- sample_attrs[sample_attrs$SMTS == "Brain", ]

brain_subtissues <- unique(brain_samples$SMTSD)
cat("\nBrain亚组织列表:\n")
for (tissue in sort(brain_subtissues)) {
  n_samples <- sum(brain_samples$SMTSD == tissue)
  cat(paste("  -", tissue, ":", n_samples, "个样本\n"))
}

cat("\n读取GTEx表达矩阵...\n")
all_colnames <- colnames(fread(gtex_gct_file, skip = 2, nrows = 0))
all_samples <- all_colnames[-c(1,2)]

brain_sample_ids <- brain_samples$SAMPID
matched_samples <- all_samples[all_samples %in% brain_sample_ids]
cat(paste("匹配到", length(matched_samples), "个Brain样本\n"))

gene_info <- fread(gtex_gct_file, skip = 2, select = c("Name", "Description"))
target_gene_rows <- sapply(target_genes, function(gene) {
  idx <- which(gene_info$Description == gene)
  if (length(idx) == 0) {
    warning(paste("基因", gene, "在GTEx数据中未找到"))
    return(NA)
  }
  return(idx[1])
})

target_expr <- data.frame(Sample = matched_samples, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

for (i in seq_along(target_genes)) {
  if (!is.na(target_gene_rows[i])) {
    cat(paste("  读取", target_genes[i], "...\n"))
    skip_rows <- 2 + target_gene_rows[i] - 1
    gene_expr <- fread(gtex_gct_file, skip = skip_rows, nrows = 1, header = FALSE)
    colnames(gene_expr) <- all_colnames
    expr_values <- as.numeric(gene_expr[1, matched_samples, with = FALSE])
    target_expr[[target_genes[i]]] <- expr_values
  }
}

target_expr$Tissue <- sapply(target_expr$Sample, function(s) {
  tissue_info <- brain_samples$SMTSD[brain_samples$SAMPID == s]
  if (length(tissue_info) > 0) return(tissue_info[1])
  else return(NA)
})

target_expr$Source <- "GTEx"

cat(paste("\n总样本数:", nrow(target_expr), "\n"))
```

# 第三部分：创建GTEx亚组织数据集

```{r create_gtex_datasets}
gtex_output_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "GTEx")
if (!dir.exists(gtex_output_dir)) {
  dir.create(gtex_output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

gtex_datasets <- list()
gtex_datasets[["Brain_All"]] <- target_expr

for (tissue in brain_subtissues) {
  tissue_name <- gsub("Brain - ", "", tissue)
  tissue_name <- gsub(" ", "_", tissue_name)
  tissue_name <- gsub("\\(", "", tissue_name)
  tissue_name <- gsub("\\)", "", tissue_name)
  
  tissue_data <- target_expr[target_expr$Tissue == tissue, ]
  if (nrow(tissue_data) > 0) {
    gtex_datasets[[tissue_name]] <- tissue_data
    cat(paste("  -", tissue_name, ":", nrow(tissue_data), "个样本\n"))
  }
}
```

# 第四部分：导出Excel数据

```{r export_excel}
brainspan_export <- brainspan_data[, c("Sample", "Age", "Donor", "Source", target_genes[target_genes %in% colnames(brainspan_data)])]
output_path <- file.path(output_dir, "BrainSpan_expression_data.xlsx")
write_xlsx(list(BrainSpan = brainspan_export), path = output_path)
cat(paste("BrainSpan数据已导出\n"))

gtex_export_list <- list()
for (name in names(gtex_datasets)) {
  dataset <- gtex_datasets[[name]]
  cols_to_export <- c("Sample", "Tissue", "Source", target_genes[target_genes %in% colnames(dataset)])
  gtex_export_list[[name]] <- dataset[, cols_to_export]
}

output_path <- file.path(gtex_output_dir, "GTEx_expression_data.xlsx")
write_xlsx(gtex_export_list, path = output_path)
cat(paste("GTEx数据已导出（包含", length(gtex_export_list), "个工作表）\n"))
```

# 第五部分：定义绘图函数

```{r define_plot_functions}
panel.raters <- function (x, y, corr = NULL, ...) {
  if (!is.null(corr)) return()
  plot.xy(xy.coords(x, y), type = "p", pch = 20, cex = .5, col = point_color, ...)
  abline(lm(y ~ x), lwd = line_size, col = line_color)
  box(col = "black", lwd = 2)
}

textPanel <- function (x = 0.5, y = 0.5, txt, cex, font) {
  text(x, y, txt, cex = cex, font = font)
  box(col = "black", lwd = 2)
}

panel.fill.cor <- function (x, y, corr = NULL, ...) {
  corr <- round(cor(x, y, use = "pairwise", method = cor_method), 2)
  ncol <- 14
  col.regions <- colorRampPalette(corr_colors)
  pal <- col.regions(ncol)
  col.ind <- as.numeric(cut(corr, breaks = seq(from = -1, to = 1, length.out = ncol + 1), include.lowest = TRUE))
  par(new=TRUE)
  plot(0, type='n', xlim=c(-1,1), ylim=c(-1,1), axes=FALSE, asp=1)
  usr <- par("usr")
  rect(usr[1], usr[3], usr[2], usr[4], col = pal[col.ind], border = NA)
  text(0, 0, labels = corr, cex = 2.5, col = ifelse(corr > 0, "black", "white"))
  box(col = "black")
}
```

# 第六部分：BrainSpan相关性分析

```{r brainspan_analysis}
cat("\n============================================================\n")
cat("BrainSpan 相关性分析\n")
cat("============================================================\n")

brainspan_corr <- brainspan_data[, target_genes[target_genes %in% colnames(brainspan_data)]]
brainspan_corr <- brainspan_corr[complete.cases(brainspan_corr), ]

cat(paste("样本数:", nrow(brainspan_corr), "\n"))

svg_path <- file.path(output_dir, "BrainSpan_corrgram.svg")
svg(svg_path, width = fig_width_corrgram, height = fig_height_corrgram)
par(bg = "#fdfdfd")
pairs(brainspan_corr, gap = 0.5, text.panel = textPanel,
      lower.panel = panel.raters, upper.panel = panel.fill.cor)
dev.off()

genes_for_scatter <- target_genes[target_genes %in% colnames(brainspan_corr)]
num_genes <- length(genes_for_scatter)

brainspan_results <- data.frame()
for (i in 1:(num_genes - 1)) {
  for (j in (i + 1):num_genes) {
    gene1 <- genes_for_scatter[i]
    gene2 <- genes_for_scatter[j]
    
    plot_data <- data.frame(x = brainspan_corr[[gene1]], y = brainspan_corr[[gene2]])
    colnames(plot_data) <- c(gene1, gene2)
    
    cor_result <- cor.test(plot_data[[1]], plot_data[[2]], method = cor_method)
    
    scatter_plot <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = .data[[gene1]], y = .data[[gene2]])) +
      geom_point(color = point_color, size = point_size, alpha = 0.6) +
      geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = line_color, linewidth = line_size) +
      labs(x = gene1, y = gene2, title = "BrainSpan") +
      annotate("text", x = Inf, y = -Inf,
               label = paste0("R = ", round(cor_result$estimate, 2), "\nP = ", format.pval(cor_result$p.value, digits = 2)),
               hjust = 1.1, vjust = -0.5, size = font_size_annotation / 3, color = "black") +
      theme_bw() +
      theme(panel.background = element_blank(), panel.grid = element_blank(),
            axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
            axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = font_size_text),
            axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = font_size_axis),
            panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 1, fill = NA),
            aspect.ratio = 1, plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = font_size_title))
    
    ggsave(file.path(output_dir, paste0("BrainSpan_scatter_", gene1, "_", gene2, ".svg")),
           plot = scatter_plot, device = "svg", width = fig_width_scatter, height = fig_height_scatter)
    
    brainspan_results <- rbind(brainspan_results, data.frame(
      Dataset = "BrainSpan", Gene1 = gene1, Gene2 = gene2,
      Correlation = round(cor_result$estimate, 4),
      P_value = format.pval(cor_result$p.value, digits = 3),
      Method = cor_method
    ))
  }
}

cat(paste("生成", nrow(brainspan_results), "个散点图\n"))
```

# 第七部分：GTEx相关性分析

```{r gtex_analysis}
cat("\n============================================================\n")
cat("GTEx 相关性分析\n")
cat("============================================================\n")

gtex_all_results <- data.frame()

for (dataset_name in names(gtex_datasets)) {
  cat(paste("\n分析:", dataset_name, "\n"))
  
  dataset <- gtex_datasets[[dataset_name]]
  expr_data <- dataset[, target_genes[target_genes %in% colnames(dataset)]]
  expr_data <- expr_data[complete.cases(expr_data), ]
  
  if (nrow(expr_data) < 3) {
    cat(paste("  样本数不足，跳过\n"))
    next
  }
  
  cat(paste("  样本数:", nrow(expr_data), "\n"))
  
  tissue_dir <- file.path(gtex_output_dir, dataset_name)
  if (!dir.exists(tissue_dir)) {
    dir.create(tissue_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  }
  
  svg_path <- file.path(tissue_dir, paste0(dataset_name, "_corrgram.svg"))
  svg(svg_path, width = fig_width_corrgram, height = fig_height_corrgram)
  par(bg = "#fdfdfd")
  pairs(expr_data, gap = 0.5, text.panel = textPanel,
        lower.panel = panel.raters, upper.panel = panel.fill.cor)
  dev.off()
  
  genes_for_scatter <- target_genes[target_genes %in% colnames(expr_data)]
  num_genes <- length(genes_for_scatter)
  
  plot_count <- 0
  for (i in 1:(num_genes - 1)) {
    for (j in (i + 1):num_genes) {
      gene1 <- genes_for_scatter[i]
      gene2 <- genes_for_scatter[j]
      
      plot_data <- data.frame(x = expr_data[[gene1]], y = expr_data[[gene2]])
      colnames(plot_data) <- c(gene1, gene2)
      
      cor_result <- cor.test(plot_data[[1]], plot_data[[2]], method = cor_method)
      
      scatter_plot <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = .data[[gene1]], y = .data[[gene2]])) +
        geom_point(color = point_color, size = point_size, alpha = 0.6) +
        geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = line_color, linewidth = line_size) +
        labs(x = gene1, y = gene2, title = dataset_name) +
        annotate("text", x = Inf, y = -Inf,
                 label = paste0("R = ", round(cor_result$estimate, 2), "\nP = ", format.pval(cor_result$p.value, digits = 2)),
                 hjust = 1.1, vjust = -0.5, size = font_size_annotation / 3, color = "black") +
        theme_bw() +
        theme(panel.background = element_blank(), panel.grid = element_blank(),
              axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
              axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = font_size_text),
              axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = font_size_axis),
              panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 1, fill = NA),
              aspect.ratio = 1, plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = font_size_title))
      
      ggsave(file.path(tissue_dir, paste0(dataset_name, "_scatter_", gene1, "_", gene2, ".svg")),
             plot = scatter_plot, device = "svg", width = fig_width_scatter, height = fig_height_scatter)
      
      plot_count <- plot_count + 1
      
      gtex_all_results <- rbind(gtex_all_results, data.frame(
        Dataset = paste0("GTEx_", dataset_name), Gene1 = gene1, Gene2 = gene2,
        Correlation = round(cor_result$estimate, 4),
        P_value = format.pval(cor_result$p.value, digits = 3),
        Method = cor_method
      ))
    }
  }
  
  cat(paste("  生成", plot_count, "个散点图\n"))
}
```

# 第八部分：保存汇总结果

```{r save_summary}
all_results <- rbind(brainspan_results, gtex_all_results)
summary_path <- file.path(output_dir, "correlation_summary.csv")
write.csv(all_results, summary_path, row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n============================================================\n")
cat("分析完成！\n")
cat("============================================================\n")
cat(paste("总计", nrow(all_results), "个相关性分析结果\n"))
cat(paste("汇总表已保存到:", summary_path, "\n"))
```

# 会话信息

```{r session_info}
sessionInfo()
```
